channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Money-Saving Advice from an Efficiency Expert
Paying for Emergency Care Without Insurance
A novel therapy targeting Î³-aminobutyric acid is safe and may be effective in major depressive disorder
item.description: 1. H3-10353, a novel GABA positive allosteric modulator, is safe and well-tolerated in healthy patients and those with major depression.

item.title: 10 Ways to Lower Prescription and Treatment Costs
item.description: Healthcare costs are at an all-time high. Take these steps to get the most from every dollar you spend.
